purpose: English Gradio Studio hero and documentation example

heritage_record.documented_brief_ko: 알파벳 A, 글자, 추상화, 멋진 펜아트
heritage_record.recorded_runtime_prompt_ko: 특이한 풍경, 환상적인 그림, 복잡한 나라, 귀여운 케릭터
heritage_record.effective_prompt_en: Alphabet A transformed into an unusual fantasy kingdom of cute characters in the sketch's tall pyramid silhouette. Striking pen-and-ink art with jewel-toned watercolor and gouache, vivid cobalt blue, turquoise, coral red, yellow and gold. Expressive faces, crisp fine lines, whimsical polished editorial illustration, clean studio background.
heritage_record.translation_method: human-written synthesis for the pinned v2 model
